External dependencies needed to build DIPlib et al., and statically linked in.

doctest/    doctest 2.4.11    2023-10-03  https://github.com/onqtam/doctest

eigen3/     Eigen 3.4.0       2022-10-11  https://eigen.tuxfamily.org

libics/     libics 1.6.5      2022-05-27  https://github.com/svi-opensource/libics
libjpeg/    libjpeg 9c        2019-02-05  https://www.ijg.org
libspng/    libspng 0.7.4     2024-03-10  https://libspng.org
libtiff/    LibTIFF 4.7.1     2026-01-22  https://gitlab.com/libtiff/libtiff
zlib/       zlib 1.3.1        2024-03-10  http://www.zlib.net

pocketfft/  PocketFFT for C++ 2024-05-03  https://gitlab.mpcdf.mpg.de/mtr/pocketfft/-/tree/cpp

pybind11/   pybind11 2.12.0   2024-03-27  https://github.com/pybind/pybind11

We don't include test code, examples, etc. from the original source distributions.
